# Daily Report — 2026-05-05

## Task Completed
Added `list_contract_assets` tool to `contract_tools.py`. The tool queries the `alm_asset`
table filtering on `maintenance_contract=<contract_sys_id>`, returning assets linked to a
given contract. Supports optional filters for `install_status` and `display_name`, plus
full pagination (`limit`/`offset`/`has_more`/`next_offset`). Reference fields (model,
vendor, location, etc.) are normalised to display values. Registered in `__init__.py`,
`tool_utils.py`, and `tool_packages.yaml` (system_administrator and full packages).

## Test Results
- Total tests: 900
- Coverage: 91% overall; contract_tools.py at 99%
- All passing: yes

## Security
No new vulnerabilities introduced. Pre-existing infra-level findings in pip/setuptools/wheel
(not project code).

## Files Changed
- `src/servicenow_mcp/tools/contract_tools.py` — added `CONTRACT_ASSET_FIELDS`,
  `_format_contract_asset`, `ListContractAssetsParams`, `list_contract_assets`
- `src/servicenow_mcp/tools/__init__.py` — imported and exported `list_contract_assets`
- `src/servicenow_mcp/utils/tool_utils.py` — imported params + function alias, registered
  tool definition
- `config/tool_packages.yaml` — added `list_contract_assets` to system_administrator and
  full packages (2 occurrences)
- `tests/test_contract_tools.py` — added `TestFormatContractAsset` (3 tests) and
  `TestListContractAssets` (10 tests)

## Next Up
Add `expire_asset_contract` tool (transition contract to expired state via PATCH
alm_contract/{sys_id} with state=expired).
